attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT OOH.ORDER_NUMBER 
,NULL		AS RECEIVED_PID--making null for shipped lines
,NULL AS RECEIVED_SN -----Need to check for ORDER line
,OOL.HEADER_ID
,OOL.LINE_ID				AS LINE_ID 
,NULL	AS ACTUAL_RECEIVED_DATE -----Need to check for ORDER line
,cast(OOH.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,NULL as  RECEIVED_SN_ON_CONTRACT
,NULL AS RECEIVED_SN_ON_WARRANTY
,current_timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NULL AS INCIDENT_NUMBER
,P.PRODUCT_ID as SHIPPED_PID
,NULL AS CLAIMED_SN
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_RESULT
,NULL AS PRIMARY_REASON
,cast(OOL.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE	AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
,LTRIM(RTRIM(UNIT_TRNS.SERIAL_NUMBER)) AS SHIPPED_SN
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OOL.HEADER_ID, OOL.LINE_ID ORDER BY UNIT_TRNS.SERIAL_NUMBER ASC) AS OUT_RANK
--,OOL.SHIPMENT_NUMBER AS OUT_RANK
,OOL.LINE_ID AS SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
,NUll as RECEIVED_SN_IN_IB             
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_INVALID           
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL OOH
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL OOL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B_RMA P 
ON OOL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = P.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS MMT
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_UNIT_TRANSACTIONS UNIT_TRNS
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_XXCTS_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL  OOH_X
WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER (OOH.CONTEXT) = 'SVO SUBMIT' 
AND OOH.HEADER_ID = OOL.HEADER_ID
AND OOL.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE ='ORDER'
AND OOL.LINE_ID  =  MMT.SOURCE_LINE_ID
AND MMT.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL
AND MMT.TRANSACTION_ID = UNIT_TRNS.TRANSACTION_ID
AND OOL.HEADER_ID		= OOH_X.HEADER_ID
AND OOH.CREATION_DATE >='2011-08-01 00:00:00' 
AND OOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >='2018-03-10 00:00:00'

SELECT OOH.ORDER_NUMBER 
,OOL.ORDERED_ITEM		AS RECEIVED_PID
,LTRIM(RTRIM(UNITTRAN.SERIAL_NUMBER)) AS RECEIVED_SN 
,OOL.HEADER_ID
,OOL.LINE_ID				AS LINE_ID 
,cast(OOL.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE	AS TIMESTAMP(0))	AS ACTUAL_RECEIVED_DATE
,cast(OOH.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_ON_CONTRACT
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_ON_WARRANTY
,current_timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NULL AS INCIDENT_NUMBER
,NULL as SHIPPED_PID---Making Null for received lines
,NULL AS CLAIMED_SN
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_RESULT
,NULL AS PRIMARY_REASON
,NULL AS ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE---need to check RETURN lines
,NULL AS SHIPPED_SN---need to check RETURN lines
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OOL.HEADER_ID, OOL.ATTRIBUTE16/*OOL.LINE_ID*/ ORDER BY UNITTRAN.SERIAL_NUMBER ASC) AS OUT_RANK
,OOL.ATTRIBUTE16 AS SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
,NUll as RECEIVED_SN_IN_IB             
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_INVALID
from $$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL OOH
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL OOL 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B_RMA P 
ON OOL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = P.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES RCV_L
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS RCVTRAN
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS  TRANS --C3.MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_UNIT_TRANSACTIONS  UNITTRAN --C3.MTL_UNIT_TRANSACTIONS
WHERE 1=1
AND OOH.HEADER_ID = OOL.HEADER_ID
AND UPPER (OOH.CONTEXT) = 'SVO SUBMIT'
AND OOH.CREATION_DATE >= '2011-08-01 00:00:00' 
AND OOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= '2018-03-01 00:00:00'
AND OOL.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE ='RETURN'
AND OOL.LINE_ID = RCV_L.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID
AND OOL.HEADER_ID = RCV_L.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID
AND RCV_L.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = RCVTRAN.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND RCV_L.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID = RCVTRAN.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
AND RCVTRAN.TRANSACTION_ID = TRANS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
AND TRANS.TRANSACTION_ID = UNITTRAN.TRANSACTION_ID
AND OOL.ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL

SELECT OOH.ORDER_NUMBER 
,OOL.ORDERED_ITEM		AS RECEIVED_PID
,LTRIM(RTRIM(UNITTRAN.SERIAL_NUMBER)) AS RECEIVED_SN 
,OOL.HEADER_ID
,OOL.LINE_ID				AS LINE_ID 
,cast(OOL.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE	AS TIMESTAMP(0))	AS ACTUAL_RECEIVED_DATE
,cast(OOH.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_ON_CONTRACT
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_ON_WARRANTY
,current_timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NULL AS INCIDENT_NUMBER
,NULL as SHIPPED_PID
,NULL AS CLAIMED_SN
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_RESULT
,NULL AS PRIMARY_REASON
,NULL AS ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
,NULL AS SHIPPED_SN---need to check RETURN lines
,NULL AS ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OOL.HEADER_ID, OOL.ATTRIBUTE16/*OOL.LINE_ID*/ ORDER BY UNITTRAN.SERIAL_NUMBER ASC) AS OUT_RANK
,OOL.ATTRIBUTE16 AS SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
,NUll as RECEIVED_SN_IN_IB             
,NULL as RECEIVED_SN_INVALID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL  OOH
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL OOL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.STD_COST_V COST_V                  
ON OOL.ORDERED_ITEM = COST_V.PID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B_RMA P
ON OOL.ORDERED_ITEM = P.PRODUCT_ID
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES RCV_L
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS RCVTRAN
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS TRANS
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_MTL_UNIT_TRANSACTIONS UNITTRAN
,$$STGDB.ST_CSF_XXCTS_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL OOH_X
WHERE 1=1
AND OOH.HEADER_ID = OOL.HEADER_ID
AND UPPER (OOH.CONTEXT) = 'SVO SUBMIT'
AND OOH.CREATION_DATE >= '2011-08-01 00:00:00' 
AND OOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= '2018-03-10 00:00:00'
AND OOL.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE = 'RETURN'
AND OOL.LINE_ID = RCV_L.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID
AND OOL.HEADER_ID = RCV_L.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID
AND RCV_L.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = RCVTRAN.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND RCV_L.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID = RCVTRAN.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
AND RCVTRAN.TRANSACTION_ID = TRANS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
AND TRANS.TRANSACTION_ID = UNITTRAN.TRANSACTION_ID
AND OOL.ATTRIBUTE16 IS NULL
AND OOL.HEADER_ID     = OOH_X.HEADER_ID
